You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>/init-explore</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING START
=======================

  <what_happened>Write</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-07T15:19:08.016Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"/home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreSDK/docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md\",\"content\":\"# OpenCoreSDK 领域知识详解\\n\\n## 1. 概述\\n\\nOpenCoreSDK 是一个 Android Native Core Dump 生成 SDK，支持在应用进程崩溃时自动生成 ELF 格式的 core dump 文件。SDK 通过 JNI 将原生能力暴露给 Java 层，提供信号拦截、线程控制、虚拟内存过滤等功能。\\n\\n**支持的架构**：ARM64、ARM32、X86、X86_64、RISC-V64、LP32、LP64\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 业务领域\\n\\n### 2.1 Core Dump Generation（核心转储生成）\\n\\nCore Dump 生成是 SDK 的核心功能，在进程崩溃时捕获完整的内存快照。\\n\\n**处理流程**：\\n1. 信号拦截（SIGSEGV、SIGABRT、SIGFPE、SIGILL、SIGBUS、SIGTRAP）\\n2. 禁用信号处理器，防止递归崩溃\\n3. Fork 子进程执行实际转储（避免阻塞主进程）\\n4. 停止所有线程（StopTheWorld）\\n5. 解析 `/proc/<pid>/maps` 获取虚拟内存区域\\n6. 生成 ELF Core 文件\\n7. 恢复线程继续执行\\n\\n**关键文件**：\\n- `opencore.cpp` - Opencore 基类实现\\n- `lp64/opencore.cpp` - 64位通用 ELF 写入逻辑\\n\\n### 2.2 Architecture Abstraction（架构抽象层）\\n\\n为了支持 7 种不同架构，SDK 设计了多层继承体系：\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (基类，公共接口)\\n    |\\n    +-- lp64::OpencoreImpl (64位通用实现)\\n    |       |\\n    |       +-- arm64::Opencore\\n    |       +-- x86_64::Opencore\\n    |       +-- riscv64::Opencore\\n    |\\n    +-- arm::Opencore (32位 ARM 特殊实现)\\n    +-- x86::Opencore (32位 x86 特殊实现)\\n    +-- lp32::Opencore (32位通用实现)\\n```\\n\\n**架构差异处理**：\\n- 各架构的寄存器布局不同（`pt_regs` 结构体）\\n- 各架构的专有寄存器不同（ARM64 的 PAC、MTE、TLS）\\n- 通过 `getMachine()` 返回 `EM_*` 常量（EM_AARCH64 = 183）\\n- 编译时通过 `#if defined(__aarch64__)` 选择对应实现\\n\\n### 2.3 JNI Bridge（Java Native Interface 桥接层）\\n\\nJNI 层负责将 C++ 能力暴露给 Java 层，采用双向通信机制：\\n\\n**Java 到 Native**：\\n```java\\nCoredump.enable(NATIVE)        // → nativeEnable()\\nCoredump.doCoredump(filename)  // → nativeCoredump(tid, filename)\\nCoredump.setCoreDir(dir)       // → nativeSetDir(dir)\\nCoredump.setCoreFlag(flag)     // → nativeSetFlag(flag)\\nCoredump.setCoreFilter(filter) // → nativeSetFilter(filter)\\n```\\n\\n**Native 到 Java**：\\n```cpp\\n// 通过回调机制通知 Java 层\\nstatic void penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback(const char* filepath) {\\n    // 创建 Java 线程调用 callbackEvent(filepath)\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**关键文件**：\\n- `opencore_jni.cpp` - JNI 方法注册与实现\\n- `Coredump.java` - Java API 封装\\n\\n### 2.4 VMA Filtering（虚拟内存区域过滤）\\n\\nVMA（Virtual Memory Area）过滤用于减少 core dump 文件大小，过滤掉不需要的内存区域。\\n\\n**过滤判断逻辑**（`IsFilterSegment` 方法）：\\n| 过滤器 | 条件 | 结果 |\\n|--------|------|------|\\n| FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | 文件路径为 `/dev/binderfs/*`, `[vvar]`, `/dev/mali0` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_FILE_VMA | inode > 0 且 flags[1] == '-'（非私有写入） | 调用 NeedFilterFile |\\n| FILTER_SHARED_VMA | flags[3] == 's' 或 'S'（共享映射） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA | 文件名为 `[anon:low shadow]`, `[anon:high shadow]`, `[anon:hwasan*]` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | flags[0-2] 全部为 '-'（不可读） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA | 文件名以 `[anon:dalvik` 开头 | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA | 文件名以 `/memfd:jit` 开头 | VMA_NULL |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 核心实体\\n\\n### 3.1 Opencore（主入口类）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nclass Opencore {\\n    // FLAG 配置\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_CORE = 1 << 0;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_PROCESS_COMM = 1 << 1;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_PID = 1 << 2;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_THREAD_COMM = 1 << 3;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_TID = 1 << 4;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_TIMESTAMP = 1 << 5;\\n\\n    // FILTER 配置\\n    static constexpr int FILTER_NONE = 0x0;\\n    static constexpr int FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA = 1 << 0;\\n    // ... 共 9 种过滤器\\n\\n    // 核心方法\\n    bool Coredump(const char* filename);          // 执行转储\\n    void StopTheWorld(int pid);                  // 停止所有线程\\n    bool StopTheThread(int tid);                  // 停止单个线程\\n    void Continue();                             // 恢复所有线程\\n    static void ParseMaps(int pid, maps);         // 解析 /proc/<pid>/maps\\n    int IsFilterSegment(VMA& vma);               // 判断 VMA 是否应过滤\\n\\n    // 工厂方法\\n    static Opencore* GetInstance();              // 获取单例\\n    static void HandleSignal(int signal, siginfo_t*, void* ucontext); // 信号处理\\n};\\n```\\n\\n### 3.2 VirtualMemoryArea（VMA 描述）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct VirtualMemoryArea {\\n    uint64_t begin;        // 起始地址\\n    uint64_t end;         // 结束地址\\n    char     flags[4];    // 权限标志 (rwx-p)\\n    uint32_t offset;      // 文件偏移\\n    uint32_t major;       // 设备主编号\\n    uint32_t minor;       // 设备次编号\\n    uint64_t inode;       // inode 号\\n    std::string file;     // 关联的文件路径\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**flags 字段含义**：\\n- `flags[0]`：r（可读）或 -（不可读）\\n- `flags[1]`：w（可写）或 -（不可写）\\n- `flags[2]`：x（可执行）或 -（不可执行）\\n- `flags[3]`：p（私有映射）或 s（共享映射）\\n\\n### 3.3 ThreadRecord（线程记录）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct ThreadRecord {\\n    int pid;        // 线程 ID (TID)\\n    bool attached;  // 是否已通过 ptrace 附加\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**用途**：在 `StopTheWorld` 时记录所有线程状态，用于后续 `Continue` 恢复。\\n\\n### 3.4 DumpOption（转储参数）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct DumpOption {\\n    char* filename;     // 输出文件名（可选，自动生成）\\n    int pid;            // 目标进程 ID\\n    int tid;            // 目标线程 ID\\n    void* siginfo;      // 信号信息\\n    void* context;      // ucontext_t（信号上下文）\\n};\\n```\\n\\n### 3.5 Elf64_prstatus（进程状态 Note）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/arm64/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\ntypedef struct elf64_prstatus {\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_signo;    // 信号编号\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_code;     // 信号代码\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_errno;     // 信号错误码\\n    uint16_t  pr_cursig;       // 当前信号\\n    uint64_t  pr_sigpend;      // 挂起信号\\n    uint64_t  pr_sighold;      // 信号阻塞掩码\\n    uint32_t  pr_pid;          // 进程 ID\\n    uint32_t  pr_ppid;         // 父进程 ID\\n    uint32_t  pr_pgrp;         // 进程组 ID\\n    uint32_t  pd_sid;          // 会话 ID\\n    uint64_t  pr_utime[2];     // 用户态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_stime[2];     // 内核态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_cutime[2];    // 累计用户态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_cstime[2];    // 累计内核态时间\\n    struct pt_regs pr_reg;     // 寄存器上下文\\n    uint32_t  pr_fpvalid;      // FP 寄存器有效标志\\n} Elf64_prstatus;\\n```\\n\\n### 3.6 Elf64_Nhdr（ELF Note Header）\\n\\n**定义位置**：使用 Linux 标准定义 (`<linux/elf.h>`)\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct Elf64_Nhdr {\\n    uint32_t n_namesz;    // name 字段大小（对齐到 4 字节）\\n    uint32_t n_descsz;    // desc 字段大小（对齐到 4 字节）\\n    uint32_t n_type;      // Note 类型\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**Note 格式**：\\n```\\n+----------------+\\n| Elf64_Nhdr     |  12 bytes\\n+----------------+\\n| name (padded)  |  n_namesz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n| desc (padded)  |  n_descsz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. FLAG 标志说明\\n\\n| 标志 | 值 | 说明 | 文件名示例 |\\n|------|-----|------|------------|\\n| FLAG_CORE | 1 << 0 (1) | 添加 \\\"core.\\\" 前缀 | `core.xxx` |\\n| FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | 1 << 1 (2) | 添加进程 comm | `core.myapp_12345` |\\n| FLAG_PID | 1 << 2 (4) | 添加进程 PID | `core.myapp_12345_1234` |\\n| FLAG_THREAD_COMM | 1 << 3 (8) | 添加线程 comm | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2` |\\n| FLAG_TID | 1 << 4 (16) | 添加线程 ID | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2_5678` |\\n| FLAG_TIMESTAMP | 1 << 5 (32) | 添加时间戳 | `core.xxx_1234567890` |\\n| FLAG_ALL | 全部组合 | 启用所有标志 | `core.myapp_pid_tid_timestamp` |\\n\\n**默认值**：\\n```cpp\\nflag = FLAG_CORE | FLAG_PID | FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | FLAG_TIMESTAMP;\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. FILTER 过滤标志说明\\n\\n| 过滤器 | 值 | 过滤条件 | 典型用途 |\\n|--------|-----|----------|----------|\\n| FILTER_NONE | 0 | 不过滤任何 VMA | 完整转储 |\\n| FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | 1 << 0 | `/dev/binderfs/*`, `[vvar]`, `/dev/mali0` | 移除设备映射 |\\n| FILTER_FILE_VMA | 1 << 1 | 非私有写入文件映射 | 移除可写的文件映射 |\\n| FILTER_SHARED_VMA | 1 << 2 | 共享映射 (flags[3] == 's') | 移除共享内存 |\\n| FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA | 1 << 3 | ASan/HWAddressSanitizer 阴影内存 | 移除 sanitizer 数据 |\\n| FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | 1 << 4 | 不可读的 VMA | 移除损坏的映射 |\\n| FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT | 1 << 5 | 保存信号上下文到 VMA | 保留崩溃上下文 |\\n| FILTER_MINIDUMP | 1 << 6 | PC/SP 相关 VMA 仅保留 | 最小化转储 |\\n| FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA | 1 << 7 | `[anon:dalvik*]` | 移除 Dalvik 堆 |\\n| FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA | 1 << 8 | `/memfd:jit*` | 移除 JIT 缓存 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. 业务流程\\n\\n### 6.1 Signal Capture（信号捕获）\\n\\n```\\n应用崩溃\\n    ↓\\nSIGSEGV/SIGABRT 等信号触发\\n    ↓\\nOpencore::HandleSignal() 被调用\\n    ↓\\npthread_mutex_lock()  // 防止重入\\n    ↓\\nDisable()  // 禁用信号处理器\\n    ↓\\nDump(siginfo, ucontext)  // 执行转储\\n    ↓\\nraise(signal)  // 重新抛出信号\\n    ↓\\npthread_mutex_unlock()\\n```\\n\\n**处理的信号**：\\n```cpp\\nstatic constexpr int kExceptionSignals[] = {\\n    SIGSEGV, SIGABRT, SIGFPE, SIGILL, SIGBUS, SIGTRAP\\n};\\n```\\n\\n### 6.2 Manual Coredump（手动转储）\\n\\n```java\\n// Java 层\\nCoredump.getInstance().doCoredump(\\\"custom/core.bin\\\");\\n\\n// Native 层\\nOpencore::Dump(filename, tid)\\n    ↓\\nOpencore::Dump(DumpOption* option)\\n    ↓\\nFork 子进程\\n    ↓\\nDoCoredump(filename)\\n    ↓\\n生成 ELF 文件\\n```\\n\\n### 6.3 VMA Filtering（VMA 过滤）\\n\\n```\\nParseMaps() 读取 /proc/<pid>/maps\\n    ↓\\nIsFilterSegment() 逐个判断 VMA\\n    ↓\\n返回 VMA_NULL（丢弃）或 VMA_NORMAL（保留）\\n    ↓\\n对于 FILTER_FILE_VMA，额外调用 NeedFilterFile()\\n    ↓\\n检查文件是否可读、ELF 架构是否匹配\\n    ↓\\nphdr[index].p_filesz = 0x0 表示丢弃\\n```\\n\\n### 6.4 Thread Stop/Resume（线程停止/恢复）\\n\\n```\\nStopTheWorld(pid)\\n    ↓\\n读取 /proc/<pid>/task 目录\\n    ↓\\n对每个 TID 调用 StopTheThread()\\n    ↓\\nptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH, tid, NULL, 0)\\n    ↓\\nwaitpid(tid, &status, WUNTRACED | __WALL)\\n    ↓\\n检查是否成功停止\\n    ↓\\n记录到 ThreadRecord 数组\\n\\nContinue()  // 恢复阶段\\n    ↓\\n遍历 ThreadRecord 数组\\n    ↓\\n对已附加的线程调用 ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH)\\n    ↓\\n清空 threads 向量\\n```\\n\\n### 6.5 ELF Write（ELF 文件写入）\\n\\n```\\nDoCoredump(filename)\\n    ↓\\nPrepare(filename) - 初始化\\n    ↓\\nStopTheWorld(pid) - 停止线程\\n    ↓\\nParseProcessMapsVma(pid) - 解析内存映射\\n    ↓\\nCreateCoreHeader() - 生成 ELF Header\\n    ↓\\nCreateCoreNoteHeader() - 生成 Note Segment Header\\n    ↓\\nCreateCorePrStatus(pid) - 收集线程寄存器\\n    ↓\\nCreateCoreAUXV(pid) - 读取 AUXV\\n    ↓\\nSpecialCoreFilter() - 应用 VMA 过滤\\n    ↓\\nWriteCoreHeader(fp) - 写入 ELF Header\\n    ↓\\nWriteCoreNoteHeader(fp) - 写入 Note Segment Header\\n    ↓\\nWriteCoreProgramHeaders(fp) - 写入 Program Headers\\n    ↓\\nWriteCorePrStatus(fp) - 写入 NT_PRSTATUS notes\\n    ↓\\nWriteCoreAUXV(fp) - 写入 NT_AUXV note\\n    ↓\\nWriteNtFile(fp) - 写入 NT_FILE note\\n    ↓\\nAlignNoteSegment(fp) - 对齐填充\\n    ↓\\nWriteCoreLoadSegment(pid, fp) - 写入内存数据\\n    ↓\\nfsync() + fclose()\\n```\\n\\n**ELF Core 文件结构**：\\n```\\n+-------------------+\\n| ELF Header        |  sizeof(Elf64_Ehdr)\\n+-------------------+\\n| Program Header 0  |  PT_NOTE (Note Segment)\\n+-------------------+\\n| Program Header 1  |  PT_LOAD (第一个 VMA)\\n+-------------------+\\n| ...               |\\n+-------------------+\\n| Program Header N  |  PT_LOAD (第 N 个 VMA)\\n+-------------------+\\n| Note Segment      |  包含 prstatus, siginfo, auxv, nt_file\\n+-------------------+\\n| Load Segment 0    |  第一个 VMA 的内存数据\\n+-------------------+\\n| Load Segment 1    |\\n+-------------------+\\n| ...               |\\n+-------------------+\\n```\\n\\n### 6.6 LD_PRELOAD Inject（注入模式）\\n\\n通过 `INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR` 宏定义，可以编译成独立的注入库：\\n\\n```cpp\\n#if defined(INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR)\\nextern \\\"C\\\" void __attribute__((constructor)) opencore_ctor_init() {\\n    Opencore::SetDir(INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR);\\n    Opencore::SetTimeout(180);\\n    Opencore::SetFlag(FLAG_CORE | FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | FLAG_PID | FLAG_TIMESTAMP);\\n    Opencore::SetFilter(FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA\\n                      | FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT);\\n    Opencore::Enable();\\n}\\n\\nextern \\\"C\\\" void __attribute__(( destructor)) opencore_dtor_init() {\\n    Opencore::Disable();\\n}\\n#endif\\n```\\n\\n**使用方式**：\\n```bash\\ncore-parser> remote hook --inject -l libopencore.so\\n```\\n\\n注入后，库加载时自动启用信号拦截，适用于 Zygote 预加载场景。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. 数据流图\\n\\n```mermaid\\nflowchart TD\\n    subgraph Java[\\\"Java 层\\\"]\\n        J_Coredump[Coredump.java]\\n        J_Handler[JavaCrashHandler]\\n    end\\n\\n    subgraph JNI[\\\"JNI 桥接层\\\"]\\n        JNI_Register[opencore_jni.cpp]\\n        JNI_Callback[callbackEvent]\\n    end\\n\\n    subgraph Native[\\\"Native 层\\\"]\\n        N_Opencore[Opencore 基类]\\n        N_lp64[lp64::OpencoreImpl]\\n        N_arm64[arm64::Opencore]\\n        N_Signal[HandleSignal]\\n    end\\n\\n    subgraph Architecture[\\\"架构实现\\\"]\\n        A_arm64[arm64::Opencore]\\n        A_x86_64[x86_64::Opencore]\\n        A_riscv64[riscv64::Opencore]\\n        A_arm[arm::Opencore]\\n        A_x86[x86::Opencore]\\n    end\\n\\n    J_Coredump -->|enable/disable| JNI_Register\\n    J_Coredump -->|doCoredump| JNI_Register\\n    J_Handler -->|uncaughtException| J_Coredump\\n    JNI_Register -->|SetCallback| N_Opencore\\n    JNI_Callback -->|callbackEvent| J_Coredump\\n    N_Opencore -->|Enable/Disable| N_Signal\\n    N_Signal -->|Dump| N_Opencore\\n    N_Opencore -->|DoCoredump| N_lp64\\n    N_lp64 -->|getMachine| N_arm64\\n    N_arm64 -->|实现| A_arm64\\n    N_lp64 Fork 子进程执行实际转储（避免阻塞主进程）\\n4. 停止所有线程（StopTheWorld）\\n5. 解析 `/proc/<pid>/maps` 获取虚拟内存区域\\n6. 生成 ELF Core 文件\\n7. 恢复线程继续执行\\n\\n**关键文件**：\\n- `opencore.cpp` - Opencore 基类实现\\n- `lp64/opencore.cpp` - 64位通用 ELF 写入逻辑\\n\\n### 2.2 Architecture Abstraction（架构抽象层）\\n\\n为了支持 7 种不同架构，SDK 设计了多层继承体系：\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (基类，公共接口)\\n    |\\n    +-- lp64::OpencoreImpl (64位通用实现)\\n    |       |\\n    | lp32::Opencore (32位通用实现)\\n```\\n\\n**架构差异处理**：\\n- 各架构的寄存器布局不同（`pt_regs` 结构体）\\n- 各架构的专有寄存器不同（ARM64 的 PAC、MTE、TLS）\\n- 通过 `getMachine()` 返回 `EM_*` 常量（EM_AARCH64 = 183）\\n- 编译时通过 `#if `/dev/binderfs/*`, `[vvar]`, `/dev/mali0` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_FILE_VMA | inode > 0 且 flags[1] == '-'（非私有写入） | 调用 NeedFilterFile |\\n| FILTER_SHARED_VMA | flags[3] == 's' 或 'S'（共享映射） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA | 文件名为 `[anon:low shadow]`, `[anon:high shadow]`, `[anon:hwasan*]` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | flags[0-2] 全部为 '-'（不可读） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA Opencore（主入口类）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nclass Opencore {\\n    // FLAG 配置\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_CORE = 1 << 0;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_PROCESS_COMM = 1 << 关联的文件路径\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**flags 字段含义**：\\n- `flags[0]`：r（可读）或 -（不可读）\\n- `flags[1]`：w（可写）或 -（不可写）\\n- `flags[2]`：x（可执行）或 -（不可执行）\\n- `flags[3]`：p（私有映射）或 s（共享映射）\\n\\n### 3.3 `StopTheWorld` 时记录所有线程状态，用于后续 `Continue` 恢复。\\n\\n### 3.4 DumpOption（转储参数）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct DumpOption {\\n    char* filename;     // 输出文件名（可选，自动生成）\\n    int pid;            // 目标进程 ID\\n    int tid;            // 目标线程 ID\\n    void* siginfo;      // 信号信息\\n    void* context;      // ucontext_t（信号上下文）\\n};\\n```\\n\\n### 3.5 Elf64_prstatus（进程状态 Note）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/arm64/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\ntypedef struct elf64_prstatus {\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_signo;    // 信号编号\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_code;     // 信号代码\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_errno; (padded)  |  n_namesz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n| desc (padded)  |  n_descsz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. FLAG 标志说明\\n\\n| 标志 | 值 | 说明 | 文件名示例 |\\n|------|-----|------|------------|\\n| FLAG_CORE | 1 << 0 (1) | 添加 \\\"core.\\\" 前缀 | `core.xxx` |\\n| FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | 1 << 1 (2) | 添加进程 comm | `core.myapp_12345` |\\n| FLAG_PID | 1 << 2 (4) | 添加进程 PID | `core.myapp_12345_1234` |\\n| FLAG_THREAD_COMM | 1 << 3 (8) | 添加线程 comm | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2` |\\n| FLAG_TID | 1 << 4 (16) | 添加线程 ID | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2_5678` |\\n| FLAG_TIMESTAMP | 1 << 5 (32) | 添加时间戳 | `core.xxx_1234567890` |\\n| FLAG_ALL | 全部组合 | 启用所有标志 | `core.myapp_pid_tid_timestamp` |\\n\\n**默认值**：\\n```cpp\\nflag = FLAG_CORE | FLAG_PID | FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | FLAG_TIMESTAMP;\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. Fork 子进程执行实际转储（避免阻塞主进程）\\n4. 停止所有线程（StopTheWorld）\\n5. 解析 `/proc/<pid>/maps` 获取虚拟内存区域\\n6. 生成 ELF Core 文件\\n7. 恢复线程继续执行\\n\\n**关键文件**：\\n- `opencore.cpp` - Opencore 基类实现\\n- `lp64/opencore.cpp` - 64位通用 ELF 写入逻辑\\n\\n### 2.2 Architecture Abstraction（架构抽象层）\\n\\n为了支持 7 种不同架构，SDK 设计了多层继承体系：\\n\\n```\\nOpencore (基类，公共接口)\\n    |\\n    +-- lp64::OpencoreImpl (64位通用实现)\\n    |       |\\n    |       +-- arm64::Opencore\\n    |       +-- x86_64::Opencore\\n    |       +-- riscv64::Opencore\\n    |\\n    +-- arm::Opencore (32位 ARM 特殊实现)\\n    +-- x86::Opencore (32位 x86 特殊实现)\\n    +-- lp32::Opencore (32位通用实现)\\n```\\n\\n**架构差异处理**：\\n- 各架构的寄存器布局不同（`pt_regs` 结构体）\\n- 各架构的专有寄存器不同（ARM64 的 PAC、MTE、TLS）\\n- 通过 `getMachine()` 返回 `EM_*` 常量（EM_AARCH64 = 183）\\n- 编译时通过 `#if defined(__aarch64__)` 选择对应实现\\n\\n### 2.3 JNI Bridge（Java Native Interface 桥接层）\\n\\nJNI 层负责将 C++ 能力暴露给 Java 层，采用双向通信机制：\\n\\n**Java 到 Native**：\\n```java\\nCoredump.enable(NATIVE)        // → nativeEnable()\\nCoredump.doCoredump(filename)  // → nativeCoredump(tid, filename)\\nCoredump.setCoreDir(dir)       // → nativeSetDir(dir)\\nCoredump.setCoreFlag(flag)     // → nativeSetFlag(flag)\\nCoredump.setCoreFilter(filter) // → nativeSetFilter(filter)\\n```\\n\\n**Native 到 Java**：\\n```cpp\\n// 通过回调机制通知 Java 层\\nstatic void penguin_opencore_sdk_coredump_callback(const char* filepath) {\\n    // 创建 Java 线程调用 callbackEvent(filepath)\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**关键文件**：\\n- `opencore_jni.cpp` - JNI 方法注册与实现\\n- `Coredump.java` - Java API 封装\\n\\n### 2.4 VMA Filtering（虚拟内存区域过滤）\\n\\nVMA（Virtual Memory Area）过滤用于减少 core dump 文件大小，过滤掉不需要的内存区域。\\n\\n**过滤判断逻辑**（`IsFilterSegment` 方法）：\\n| 过滤器 | 条件 | 结果 |\\n|--------|------|------|\\n| FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA | 文件路径为 `/dev/binderfs/*`, `[vvar]`, `/dev/mali0` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_FILE_VMA | inode > 0 且 flags[1] == '-'（非私有写入） | 调用 NeedFilterFile |\\n| FILTER_SHARED_VMA | flags[3] == 's' 或 'S'（共享映射） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA | 文件名为 `[anon:low shadow]`, `[anon:high shadow]`, `[anon:hwasan*]` | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | flags[0-2] 全部为 '-'（不可读） | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_JAVAHEAP_VMA | 文件名以 `[anon:dalvik` 开头 | VMA_NULL |\\n| FILTER_JIT_CACHE_VMA | 文件名以 `/memfd:jit` 开头 | VMA_NULL |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 核心实体\\n\\n### 3.1 Opencore（主入口类）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nclass Opencore {\\n    // FLAG 配置\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_CORE = 1 << 0;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_PROCESS_COMM = 1 << 1;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_PID = 1 << 2;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_THREAD_COMM = 1 << 3;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_TID = 1 << 4;\\n    static constexpr int FLAG_TIMESTAMP = 1 << 5;\\n\\n    // FILTER 配置\\n    static constexpr int FILTER_NONE = 0x0;\\n    static constexpr int FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA = 1 << 0;\\n    // ... 共 9 种过滤器\\n\\n    // 核心方法\\n    bool Coredump(const char* filename);          // 执行转储\\n    void StopTheWorld(int pid);                  // 停止所有线程\\n    bool StopTheThread(int tid);                  // 停止单个线程\\n    void Continue();                             // 恢复所有线程\\n    static void ParseMaps(int pid, maps);         // 解析 /proc/<pid>/maps\\n    int IsFilterSegment(VMA& vma);               // 判断 VMA 是否应过滤\\n\\n    // 工厂方法\\n    static Opencore* 描述）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct VirtualMemoryArea {\\n    uint64_t begin;        // 起始地址\\n    uint64_t end;         // 结束地址\\n    char     flags[4];    // 权限标志 (rwx-p)\\n 关联的文件路径\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**flags 字段含义**：\\n- `flags[0]`：r（可读）或 -（不可读）\\n- `flags[1]`：w（可写）或 -（不可写）\\n- `flags[2]`：x（可执行）或 -（不可执行）\\n- `flags[3]`：p（私有映射）或 s（共享映射）\\n\\n### 3.3 ThreadRecord（线程记录）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct ThreadRecord {\\n    int pid;        // 线程 ID (TID)\\n    bool attached;  // 是否已通过 ptrace 附加\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**用途**：在 `StopTheWorld` 时记录所有线程状态，用于后续 `Continue` 恢复。\\n\\n### 3.4 DumpOption（转储参数）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct DumpOption {\\n    char* filename;     // 输出文件名（可选，自动生成）\\n    int pid;            // 目标进程 ID\\n    int tid;            // 目标线程 ID\\n    void* siginfo;      // 信号信息\\n    void* context;      // ucontext_t（信号上下文）\\n};\\n```\\n\\n### 3.5 Elf64_prstatus（进程状态 Note）\\n\\n**位置**：`opencore/arm64/opencore.h`\\n\\n```cpp\\ntypedef struct elf64_prstatus {\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_signo;    // 信号编号\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_code;     // 信号代码\\n    uint32_t  pr_si_errno; pr_ppid;         // 父进程 ID\\n    uint32_t  pr_pgrp;         // 进程组 ID\\n    uint32_t  pd_sid;          // 会话 ID\\n    uint64_t  pr_utime[2];     // 用户态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_stime[2];     // 内核态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_cutime[2];    // 累计用户态时间\\n    uint64_t  pr_cstime[2];    // 累计内核态时间\\n    struct pt_regs pr_reg;     // 寄存器上下文\\n    uint32_t  pr_fpvalid;      // FP 寄存器有效标志\\n} Elf64_prstatus;\\n```\\n\\n### 3.6 Elf64_Nhdr（ELF Note Header）\\n\\n**定义位置**：使用 Linux 标准定义 (`<linux/elf.h>`)\\n\\n```cpp\\nstruct Elf64_Nhdr {\\n    uint32_t n_namesz;    // name 字段大小（对齐到 4 字节）\\n    uint32_t n_descsz;    // desc 字段大小（对齐到 4 字节）\\n    uint32_t n_type;      // Note 类型\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**Note 格式**：\\n```\\n+----------------+\\n| Elf64_Nhdr     |  12 bytes\\n+----------------+\\n| name (padded)  |  n_namesz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n| desc (padded)  |  n_descsz bytes (对齐到 4)\\n+----------------+\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. FLAG 标志说明\\n\\n| 标志 | 值 | 说明 | 文件名示例 |\\n|------|-----|------|------------|\\n| FLAG_CORE | 1 << 0 (1) | 添加 \\\"core.\\\" 前缀 | `core.xxx` |\\n| FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | 1 << 1 (2) | 添加进程 comm | `core.myapp_12345` |\\n| FLAG_PID | 1 << 2 (4) | 添加进程 PID | `core.myapp_12345_1234` |\\n| FLAG_THREAD_COMM | 1 << 3 (8) | 添加线程 comm | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2` |\\n| FLAG_TID | 1 << 4 (16) | 添加线程 ID | `core.myapp_12345_1234_Thread-2_5678` |\\n| FLAG_TIMESTAMP | 1 << 5 (32) | 添加时间戳 | `core.xxx_1234567890` |\\n| FLAG_ALL | 全部组合 | 启用所有标志 | `core.myapp_pid_tid_timestamp` |\\n\\n**默认值**：\\n```cpp\\nflag = FLAG_CORE | FLAG_PID | FLAG_PROCESS_COMM | FLAG_TIMESTAMP;\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. `/dev/mali0` | 移除设备映射 |\\n| FILTER_FILE_VMA | 1 << 1 | 非私有写入文件映射 | 移除可写的文件映射 |\\n| FILTER_SHARED_VMA | 1 << 2 | 共享映射 (flags[3] == 's') | 移除共享内存 |\\n| FILTER_SANITIZER_SHADOW_VMA | 1 << 3 | ASan/HWAddressSanitizer 阴影内存 | 移除 sanitizer 数据 |\\n| FILTER_NON_READ_VMA | 1 << 4 | 不可读的 VMA | 移除损坏的映射 |\\n| FILTER_SIGNAL_CONTEXT | 1 << 5 | 保存信号上下文到 VMA | 保留崩溃上下文 |\\n| FILTER_MINIDUMP | 1 << 6 |
